runTitle: Vercel Playwright targeted QA - v8.11.62 dashboard AI data slot drift
coveredSurfaces: dashboard status summary vs AI response parity

aiLatencyObservations.surface: AI sidebar job queue advisory query
aiLatencyObservations.source: job result payload and Performance API resource timing

expertAssessments.rationale: AI answer did not preserve dashboard-visible OTel data slot at a 10-minute boundary.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Propagate dashboard dataSlotInfo into AI queryAsOf for sidebar job requests.

expertAssessments.rationale: Dashboard showed 16 online / 1 warning / 1 critical on slot 131, while AI answered 17 online / 1 warning / 0 critical from a different slot.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Add regression coverage for dashboard-provided queryAsOfDataSlot.

expertAssessments.rationale: POST /api/ai/jobs returned 201 in 1196ms and SSE completed without reconnect storm; failure is data-slot parity, not infrastructure.
Playwright MCP captured UI, network, DOM, and Performance API evidence for the regression.

usageChecks.summary: Vercel usage after targeted production QA remained normal: effective 19.0897 USD, billed 0.0000 USD.

artifacts.label: v8.11.62 AI slot drift DOM evidence
v8.11.62 AI slot drift network evidence

pendingImprovements.title: AI sidebar job requests must use the dashboard-visible OTel data slot at 10-minute boundaries
pendingImprovements.note: Reproduced on v8.11.62: dashboard slot 131 showed critical/warning counts, AI job answered from slot 132.

notes: result: no-go for v8.11.62 targeted AI parity scope
POST /api/ai/jobs: 201, 1196ms; SSE stream: 6433ms, 5784 bytes, 1 stream entry
Root cause: dashboard was still showing the server-rendered 21:50 snapshot while the job API recomputed queryAsOf at 22:00.
